mapper.select: SELECT lvl, qrno, qno, mno, qrcontent, qrdelFlag, qrregDate, qrmodDate, qrcno FROM ( SELECT /*+ INDEX(a FK_QNA_REPLY) */ ROWNUM rn, LEVEL lvl, a.* FROM dutch.tbl_qna_reply a WHERE qno = #{qno } AND ROWNUM <= (#{pageNum} * #{rowAmountPerPage}) START WITH qrno IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR qno = qrno ) WHERE rn >= ((#{pageNum} * #{rowAmountPerPage}) - (#{rowAmountPerPage} - 1))
SELECT count(*) from dutch.tbl_qna_reply where qno = #{qno }
mapper.insert:
SELECT dutch.seq_qna_reply.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO dutch.tbl_qna_reply VALUES (#{qno} , #{mno}, #{qrcontent}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT)

SELECT dutch.seq_qna_reply.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO dutch.tbl_qna_reply VALUES (#{qno} , #{mno}, #{qrcontent}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, #{qrcno})
mapper.update: UPDATE dutch.tbl_qna_reply SET qrcontent = #{qrcontent } , qrmodDate = DEFAULT WHERE qno = #{qno } AND qrcno = #{qrcno }
UPDATE dutch.tbl_qna_reply SET qrdelFlag = 1, qrmodDate = DEFAULT WHERE qno = #{qno } AND qrcno = #{qrcno }
